description: Court ledger. Containing multiple legal records/testimonies. Location: Probably Alexandria, since Goitein identifies the handwriting as belonging to the teacher Yehuda b. Aharon Ibn al-ʿAmmānī. One of the entries is dated: Thursday, 6 Adar [4800 +] 196 = 4996 AM = 14 February 1236 CE. (Ashtor believed this document to be from Cairo and the date to be [5]196 AM= 1436 CE.) (Information mainly from Goitein's index card.)
